home.heroTitle: Your Amazonian Retreat in Eldorado dos Carajás
home.heroSubtitle: Comfort, nature and hospitality in the heart of the Pará Amazon.
home.highlightAmazonicaDesc: Decor and atmosphere inspired by the richness of local fauna and flora.
home.highlightLocalizacaoDesc: In the center of Eldorado dos Carajás, close to everything you need.
home.highlightConfortoDesc: 46 air-conditioned apartments with full infrastructure for your rest.
home.highlightCafeDesc: Complimentary buffet with authentic flavors of Pará cuisine.
home.sobreTitle: An Oasis of Tranquility in the Heart of Pará
home.sobreP1: Gaivota Hotel is more than accommodation — it's an authentic experience of the Pará Amazon. With a carefully planned structure, our environments evoke the natural beauty of the region, creating a welcoming and unique atmosphere.
home.sobreP2: We offer 46 air-conditioned apartments, covered parking, complimentary regional breakfast and a team dedicated to your well-being.
home.acomodacoesDesc: Each room is an invitation to relax, with decor inspired by the Amazon fauna and flora.
home.confortoItem1: Air conditioning and solar water heating
home.ctaTitle: Book Now and Experience the Amazon
home.ctaDesc: Contact us via WhatsApp and secure your stay at Gaivota Hotel.

quartos.heroSubtitle: Comfort and Amazonian theme in every detail
quartos.introText: Each room is an invitation to relax, with decor inspired by the Amazon fauna and flora. Spacious, air-conditioned rooms equipped with solar water heating, mini-fridge and private bathroom. All rooms include regional breakfast.
quartos.disclaimer: * Prices are for reference and may vary by season. No room has a safe.

estrutura.gastro2: Container — à la carte restaurant, steak on the griddle
estrutura.gastro3: Pizza Prime — best pizzeria in town (2km)
estrutura.lazer1: Town Square and Rural Producers' Fair
estrutura.servicosAnexosDesc: Gaivota Hotel features the Gaivota Supermarket and Gaivota Snack Bar adjacent to the hotel, plus a Bradesco Express banking correspondent for your convenience.
estrutura.servicosAnexosFoot: Everything you need, without leaving the hotel.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Does Gaivota Hotel offer special conditions for companies and employee accommodation?
faq.a1: Yes, Gaivota Hotel has differentiated and flexible conditions for corporate accommodation and billing for companies wishing to accommodate their employees in Eldorado dos Carajás. Contact us for more details about our solutions for companies of various sectors and accommodation needs.
faq.q2: Is the hotel prepared to receive business travelers, such as executives?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Our accommodations are designed to offer maximum comfort and functionality for executives and business travelers, with high-speed Wi-Fi, air-conditioned environments and work desks, ensuring a productive and relaxing stay.
faq.q3: What is the location of Gaivota Hotel in relation to major companies and business areas in Eldorado dos Carajás?
faq.a3: We are strategically located in the center of Eldorado dos Carajás, with easy access to main roads and areas of commercial and industrial interest, ideal for those looking for a hotel near large companies and business centers in the region.
faq.q4: Is breakfast included and does it accommodate those who need to start early for work?
faq.a4: Yes, our delicious breakfast buffet with regional options is always included in the daily rate. We serve a complete and hearty breakfast, perfect to provide the energy needed for an intense work day.
faq.q5: Does the hotel offer secure parking for company vehicles?
faq.a5: Yes, we have ample covered and secure parking with capacity for 30 cars, providing peace of mind for guests traveling with personal or company vehicles.
faq.q6: How can I request a quote or make a reservation for a group of company employees?
faq.a6: For corporate quotes and reservations, please contact us directly by phone at (94) 99285-4456 or through our contact form. Our team is ready to offer the best solution for your company.

politica.heroSubtitle: Transparency and security for your stay
politica.intro: We value clarity in our policies. We recommend checking the specific conditions of each reservation when booking.
politica.cancelamento1: Free cancellation within 7 days after booking, in accordance with Brazilian law.
politica.crianca1: Children of all ages are welcome.
politica.crianca2: From 6 years old, charged as adults.
politica.petsMsg: Pets are not allowed on hotel premises.
politica.faturamentoDesc: Companies wishing to accommodate employees can opt for billing via bank slip (boleto). Contact us for more information.

reviews.title: What Our Guests Say
reviews.desc: Real reviews from guests who have stayed at Gaivota Hotel.
